channel.title: flove making-of — ai questions
channel.description: New ai design questions from flove interviews.

item.title: What AI fine-tuning approach for module 42?
item.description:
• Full fine-tuning — Train entire model. Best quality, highest cost. • LoRA — Low-rank adaptation. Cheaper, nearly as good, less control. • No fine-tuning — Use base model as-is. Free, least customized. • Defer — Don't decide yet — wait until module 42 is closer to shipping.
★ decided: — · ◇ recommended: Defer
